lastTicket.title: AgentView shell: SessionList, SessionPane, SessionHeader, StatusStrip
Message components: User, Assistant, Thinking, Avatar (path:line linkification)
Tool result frames: ReadResult, GrepResult, EditDiff, BashOutput + ToolFrame
AgentView shell: SessionList, SessionPane, SessionHeader, StatusStrip
handoff: Built AgentView shell on parchment tokens: SessionList (filter input + candle pulse on streaming sessions), SessionHeader (relay ID + serif title + status pill + StatusStrip + stop button), StatusStrip (model + tokens + current tool + last file, derived from session.events' most recent tool_use). SessionPane composes SessionHeader over a 820px-max body column over the existing PromptInput. Wired App.setRelayId through AgentView.onSelectRelay so clicking a session row updates the title bar selector too. Existing Message.tsx + PromptInput.tsx + ToolCall.tsx still use legacy bg-surface/text-text tokens — they render but visibly unstyled; T2/T3/T4 will replace them entirely.
next_steps: T2: replace Message.tsx with UserMsg/AssistantMsg/ThinkingMsg + Avatar; AssistantMsg needs path:line linkification firing onJumpToFile (cross-tab nav contract from impl-guide §6)
verify: cd yah-ui && bun run typecheck   # only pre-existing serve.ts errors
cd yah-ui && bun run dev  # click Agent tab; SessionList/Header/StatusStrip render in parchment; toggle theme to candlelight

lastTicket.title: Message components: User, Assistant, Thinking, Avatar (path:line linkification)
handoff: Built parchment-tokens message components: messages/Avatar.tsx (28x28 rounded square; oxblood ✦ for agent, midnight Y for user, ink-4/30 muted variant for thinking), messages/UserMsg.tsx (avatar + 'You' eyebrow + serif body), messages/AssistantMsg.tsx (avatar + 'Agent · claude' eyebrow + serif body with backtick splitter — path:line spans become accent-tinted dashed-underline buttons firing onJumpToFile, plain code becomes paper-3 chips), messages/ThinkingMsg.tsx (muted avatar + collapsible italic eyebrow + dashed left-border body when open). Rewrote Message.tsx as a thin dispatcher that routes user/assistant.text/assistant.thinking to the new components and assistant.tool_use through the existing ToolCall (T3 will replace ToolCall + add tool-result rendering). Plumbed onJumpToFile from App.tsx jumpToFile through AgentView → SessionPane → Message → AssistantMsg. Updated mock e9 to include 'src/ticket.rs:663' so the linkification chip is visible without backend wiring. typecheck shows only the 5 pre-existing serve.ts Bun/Node typedef errors; bun run build green. Did NOT exercise the UI in a browser this turn — flag any visual regressions.

Avatar, UserMsg, AssistantMsg (with backtick path:line linkification), ThinkingMsg landed under yah-ui/src/components/agent/messages/. SessionPane → AgentView → App.tsx now plumb onJumpToFile so chips switch to Architecture tab. Old Message.tsx is a thin dispatcher over the new files.
next_steps: Visual sign-off: bun run dev, click Agent tab, select R012-T2 session. Confirm avatar tiles render (Y on midnight for user; ✦ on oxblood for agent; muted ink-4/30 for thinking). User row shows 'You' eyebrow + serif body. Assistant text rows show 'Agent · claude' eyebrow + serif body. The e9 message ('Added verify-inheritance helper at src/ticket.rs:663…') should render the path:line as a dashed-underline accent chip; click → switches to Architecture tab and re-roots to ticket node id. Thinking row collapses by default; click chevron → italic body with dashed left rule.
Edge cases not exercised: dark theme (parchment swap), very long content wrapping inside the 820px column, code chips with non-path content, multiple path:line in one message.
verify: cd yah-ui && bun run typecheck   # only pre-existing serve.ts errors
cd yah-ui && bun run dev  # click Agent tab; verify avatars/eyebrows/path:line chip click → arch tab
gotchas: Tool result events (role=='tool') currently render nothing — the prior placeholder dim line was removed because T3 will replace tool surfaces wholesale. Mock e4/e6/e8/e11 will appear missing from the transcript until T3 lands; that's expected, not a regression.

Two stale 'rs-hack board serve' processes (pids 92374 + 92551) keep racing with Edit tools — every other write returned 'File has been modified since read'. The new 'yah board serve' (pid 95405) is the authoritative one; consider killing the rs-hack instances before more frontend work.

lastTicket.title: Tool result frames: ReadResult, GrepResult, EditDiff, BashOutput + ToolFrame
handoff: Built ToolFrame chrome (icon + tool label + headline + meta tags) and four result bodies under yah-ui/src/components/agent/tools/: ReadResult (italic summary line), GrepResult (clickable rows that fire onJumpToFile → Architecture tab), EditDiff (add/del row backgrounds via color-mix on st-review/st-bug), BashOutput (paper-3-tinted pre with $ prompt). ToolFrame defaults edit/grep open and read/bash closed per the design return. Rewrote Message.tsx to dispatch tool_use through ToolFrame and accept an optional paired result; SessionPane now walks events to pair each tool_use with its next role:tool result, dropping standalone tool result events from the rendered list. Deleted the obsolete ToolCall.tsx. Mock e3+e4 (read), e5+e6 (grep, with one hit linkifying to src/ticket.rs:663), e7+e8 (edit with +8/−0 meta), e10+e11 (bash with exit 0 + cargo test stdout) all render as paired cards. typecheck shows only the pre-existing serve.ts + tauri.ts errors; bun run build green. Did NOT exercise the UI in a browser this turn — flag any visual regressions.
next_steps: Visual sign-off: bun run dev, click Agent tab, select R012-T2 session. Confirm: (a) read frame shows path + range, body italic summary; (b) grep frame open by default, click 'src/ticket.rs:663' row → switches to Architecture tab; (c) edit frame open by default, diff renders with green/red backgrounds and +8/−0 meta in the header; (d) bash frame closed by default, expand → $ prompt + paper-3 stdout block + 'exit 0' meta. Edge cases not exercised: dark theme parchment swap, very long stdout/diffs (max-h-72/max-h-56 should scroll), tool_use without a paired result event (should show 'Reading…' / 'Running…' placeholders), grep with empty result array (should show 'No matches.').
verify: cd yah-ui && bun run typecheck   # only pre-existing serve.ts + tauri.ts errors
cd yah-ui && bun run dev   # Agent tab; R012-T2 session; verify each tool frame's headline, meta, and body

lastTicket.title: PromptBar + StreamingCursor + NoSession
handoff: PromptBar (paperclip+textarea+send/stop+keybinds), StreamingCursor (italic 'agent is working' + accent candle dot, 28px gutter to align with avatars), NoSession (Splash + 'No session yet' + 'start agent on <relayId>' CTA when relayId present). Wired SessionPane to render StreamingCursor when session.status==='streaming' and to forward onSend/onStop to PromptBar. AgentView swapped its inline no-session block for <NoSession>. Deleted obsolete PromptInput.tsx. PromptBar key bindings: ⌘↵ send (Enter alone is newline per design footer), ⌘. stop (only fires when streaming), ⇧⏎ newline. Send button toggles to a stop button while streaming. typecheck shows only the pre-existing serve.ts + tauri.ts errors; bun run build green. Did NOT exercise the UI in a browser this turn — flag any visual regressions.
next_steps: Visual sign-off: bun run dev → Agent tab → R012-T2 session. Confirm: (a) StreamingCursor appears below the last message with italic copy + pulsing accent dot; (b) PromptBar shows stop button (not send) while session.status==='streaming', clicking stop fires onStop; (c) typing → ⌘↵ sends, plain Enter inserts newline, ⌘. while streaming triggers stop; (d) deselect relay → NoSession appears with lantern splash + 'No relay selected'; (e) select an unvisited relay → NoSession with 'No session yet' + 'start agent on <relayId>' CTA.

Edge cases not exercised: dark theme parchment swap on PromptBar/StreamingCursor; very long pasted prompts (textarea auto-grows up to 200px); ⌘. invocation when not streaming (currently a no-op — no toast).
Once R010-T4 is visually approved, archive R010-T1/T2/T3/T4 and move R010 itself to review (or archive if signed off).
verify: cd yah-ui && bun run dev   # Agent tab; verify StreamingCursor + PromptBar (stop while streaming, ⌘↵ send, ⌘. stop, ⇧⏎ newline) + NoSession
